title: snooPack
description: I have created a personalized pack that modifies the appearance of various game elements. The pack includes purple-colored game icons.
body:
I have created a personalized pack that modifies the appearance of various game elements. The pack includes purple-colored game icons, certain mobs with unique designs, and a customized heads-up display (HUD). The modifications are intended to enhance the visual experience of the game and provide a unique gameplay style.

Version Compatible
1.19.4 ✅
1.19.2 ✅
1.19.1 ✅
1.19 ✅

Thank you for using my texture pack! If you enjoy it, I would appreciate if you could follow me and share your thoughts on it.
